Headline: #62 Archer Temporary Reroute at Archer/Brighton Place
ShortDescription: #62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, Pershing, California and Archer due to street blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, Pershing, California, then resume their normal route on Archer.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.
